tool_args.label: June 2025 Crime Report
tool_args.raw_text: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies (including homicide, robbery, assault, and rape) in addition to hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system. The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month prior to the reporting period.

payload.title: June 2025 Crime Report
payload.description: Monthly crime statistics report for the NYCT Subway system submitted by NYPD Transit Bureau to MTA Committee Members
